data.title: MaxLinear Stock Rockets After Q1 Earnings: Here's Why
data.description: MaxLinear, Inc. (NASDAQ: MXL) released its first-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst projections both in revenue and earnings. The company reported adjusted earnings of 22 cents per share for the quarter, exceeding the anticipated 18 cents. Quarterly revenue amounted to $137.19 million, surpassing the predicted $135 million. CEO Kishore Seendripu noted that Q1 signals the beginning of a multi-year growth phase for MaxLinear, particularly driven by the increasing momentum in optical data center connectivity. MXL stock is showing movement following the report. Stay updated on the price fluctuations. For further details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Orion S.A. Declares Interim Quarterly Dividend
data.description: A global specialty chemicals company, Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC), disclosed it will issue an interim dividend of $0.0207 per common share in Q3 of 2026. The total payout of around $1.2 million corresponds to the current number of common shares outstanding. Shareholders as of the close on July 2, 2026, in New York, NY, will receive the dividend.

data.title: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation Schedules Earnings Release and Conference Call for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation (NYSE: ACRE) has stated that it is set to release its earnings report for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. The company will be hosting a webcast/conference call on the same day at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Interested parties are encouraged to join in on the discussion via telephone.

data.title: Optimum to Hold Conference Call to Discuss Q1 2026 Results
data.description: Optimum Communications (NYSE: OPTU) has scheduled a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to review the financial and operating outcomes for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. Dennis Mathew, Chairman and CEO, along with Marc Sirota, CFO, will guide the conference call. The related presentation materials, comprising Optimum’s earnings release, earnings results presentation, and trended schedule, will be accessible at 7:00 a.m. ET before the call.

data.title: FIS to Report First Quarter Earnings on May 8, 2026
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, FIS, a leading financial services technology company listed on the NYSE under FIS, is set to reveal its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes on Friday, May 8th before the market opens. They will host a live webcast of the earnings conference call for investors starting at 8:30 a.m. (EDT) on the same day. Interested parties can watch the webcast by visiting the Investor Relations segment of FIS’ website, www.fisglobal.com. A playback option will be accessible after the live session ends.

data.title: N-able to Host First Quarter Earnings Conference Call on May 7, 2026
data.description: N-able, a global cybersecurity company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol NABL, is set to hold a conference call to review its financial performance for Q1 of 2026 on May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The live webcast can be accessed at http://investors.n-able.com. Following the event, a temporary replay of the webcast will be made available. Further details will be released by N-able.

data.title: Kenvue to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) is set to reveal its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, prior to the market opening. As a result of the ongoing deal with Kimberly-Clark, the company will not conduct a quarterly conference call to discuss the financial outcomes. Interested parties can access the press release on the firm’s website at investors.kenvue.com. Kenvue Inc. stands as the top consumer health enterprise globally in terms of revenue and has a history spanning over a century.

data.title: Jamieson Wellness Inc. Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: In Toronto today, Jamieson Wellness Inc. (TSX:JWEL) revealed that they will unveil their first quarter financial results for 2026 after market hours on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Following this, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, the company will hold a conference call for investors to address these results. To participate in the call, individuals can dial 1-800-717-1738 from Canada and the U.S. or 1-646-307-1865 from other international locations.

data.title: Rexford Industrial Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Los Angeles, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust specializing in industrial properties in Southern California, announced their latest venture. The company aims to grow value through investment and operation of industrial properties in the region.

data.title: PMI Foods Celebrates Earth Day By Planting 10,000 Additional Trees With One Tree Planted
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Salt Lake City, Parker Migliorini International (PMI Foods) made a significant contribution of more than $13,000 to One Tree Planted, a renowned nonprofit dedicated to worldwide reforestation efforts. The donation aims to support the planting of an additional 10,000 trees as part of their partnership. This generous initiative was announced as a part of the Earth Day celebrations.

data.title: Sensient Declares Dividend
data.description: In Milwaukee, the Board of Directors of Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record on May 11, 2026, will receive the cash dividend on June 1, 2026. Sensient Technologies is a prominent worldwide producer and promoter of colors, flavors, and specialized ingredients, utilizing cutting-edge technologies and a strong global supply network.

data.title: Escalade Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call Date
data.description: Evansville, Indiana – On April 23, 2026, Escalade, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESCA), a prominent provider of sporting goods and recreational equipment, revealed plans to disclose its Q1 2026 financial results before trading commences. Escalade, Inc. is recognized for manufacturing and distributing a wide range of indoor and outdoor recreational products. The company's stock is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol ESCA.

data.title: Franklin Financial Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; Declares Dividend
data.description: A financial institution based in Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, Franklin Financial Services Corporation recently disclosed their performance for the first quarter of 2026. As the bank holding company for F&M Trust, the Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as FRAF, outlined key operational figures.

data.title: SiriusXM Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Today, SiriusXM declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: SIRI). The dividend will be paid on May 27, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business.

data.title: Delta Air Lines Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Atlanta, the Board of Directors of Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share. Shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026, are eligible for this dividend, which will be distributed on June 4, 2026. Delta Air Lines, a major airline company, regularly provides dividends to its shareholders.

data.title: SUMMIT HOTEL PROPERTIES DECLARES FIRST QUARTER 2026 DIVIDENDS
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 23, 2026, Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. (NYSE: INN) disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, amounting to $0.08 per common stock share.

data.title: Encompass Health to participate in BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference
data.description: Today, Encompass Health Corp. (NYSE: EHC) revealed its plans to join the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference on May 12-14, 2026. The event, scheduled to take place in Birmingham, Alabama, will see the participation of the company's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Doug. This conference is expected to attract significant attention from investors and industry professionals alike.

data.title: Urban One, Inc. First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: A conference call will be held by Urban One, Inc. based in Silver Spring, Md., to discuss the results of the first fiscal quarter of 2026. The company, trading under NASDAQ symbols UONEK and UONE, invites investors, analysts, and other interested parties to join the call. The scheduled date for the conference call is Thursday, May.
